reasoning: Order #000000515 is marked Complete with the item invoiced and shipped (Qty shipped: 1). Payment was successfully collected and there is no indication of a failed shipment or prior delivery issue in the order record. Since the customer claims non-receipt despite shipment, this requires a shipping investigation (carrier tracking, delivery confirmation) before issuing a refund. Escalating to logistics/returns team is appropriate rather than immediate approval or denial.
